value.PublicRemarks: Rare offering in prestigious Upper Thornhill Estates - an exceptional detached two-storey residence, meticulously maintained by the original owners. This well-appointed home features 4 generously sized bedrooms and 4 bathrooms, thoughtfully designed for both comfort and functionality. Hardwood flooring extends throughout the main and second levels, enhancing the home's refined and cohesive aesthetic. A highly desirable second-floor laundry adds everyday convenience and practicality. The finished basement offers versatile additional living space, ideal for recreation, a home office, or extended family use. The property is further distinguished by its beautifully landscaped backyard - a private, serene setting with mature trees and established greenery, creating a true outdoor retreat. Situated in one of Vaughan's most sought-after communities, close to top-rated schools, parks, and everyday amenities. An outstanding opportunity to own a quality home in Upper Thornhill Estates. (id:65552)
